# Title

Date: YYYY-MM-DD

Status: `draft` | `reviewed` | `source`

![Short thematic preview alt text](../../assets/article-previews/example-preview.svg)

## Summary

Write one short paragraph explaining:

- what this publication is about;
- why it matters;
- what kind of reader it is for.

## Main Body

Add the main text here.

## Sources Or Notes

- Add official links when needed.
- Keep public claims source-backed.
- Do not imply partnership or endorsement.

## Visual Checklist

- [ ] Preview image is included near the top.
- [ ] Preview matches the subject of the article.
- [ ] Alt text is meaningful.
- [ ] No third-party logo implies endorsement.
- [ ] The same topic image can be reused across all six UN-language versions.
